title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 6-B.  REGISTRY OF VIOLENT OFFENSES

AGAINST PEACE OFFICERS

§641.  Short title

This Chapter may be referred to and may be cited as "The Trey Hutchison Act".

Acts 2005, No. 163, §1, eff. June 28, 2005.
